scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui ~3-4 anos de experiência em funções de PM/TPM em tecnologia, o que está abaixo do requerido de 6-10 anos nesta vaga. No entanto, ele tem experiência relevante em gestão de programas digitais, Scrum e liderança de equipes. Suas habilidades técnicas e de entrega parecem adequadas, mas há uma lacuna de seniority que impede um score mais alto.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Lacuna de seniority em relação aos 6-10 anos exigidos no domínio.
scored_jobs.title: Senior Project Manager/Scrum Master

core_requirements.requirement: 6-10 years of experience leading complex, end-to-end digital programs in an agency, consultancy, or professional services environment, ideally for enterprise or global clients, with a proven record of delivering flagship digital experiences and high-profile platforms.
core_requirements.evidence: ~3-4 years of PM/TPM experience in technology, including roles as PO, TPM, PM, and PO again (from Jul/2022 to present). Candidate also has experience in construction/civil engineering prior to transitioning to tech, but this is not counted towards the PM/TPM seniority.

core_requirements.requirement: Prior experience as a Project Manager or Scrum Lead supporting digital initiatives, demonstrating the ability to navigate technical complexity, high visibility, and elevated expectations for performance, reliability, and delivery.
core_requirements.evidence: Candidate has experience as a PO, TPM, and PM, demonstrating strong Agile/Scrum skills and the ability to manage digital initiatives and delivery. The profile also highlights the candidate's experience in facilitating Scrum ceremonies and driving continuous improvement.

core_requirements.requirement: Ability to work during Pacific Time (PT) hours, typically 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
core_requirements.evidence: The job description specifies that candidates must be able to work standard Pacific Time (PT) hours, from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. The profile does not mention any restrictions related to this requirement.

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui experiência relevante em gestão de programas e projetos complexos, incluindo coordenação global, gestão de releases e design técnico. No entanto, o gap de seniority (3-4 anos vs 8+ anos) é um fator limitante, que justifica uma pontuação dentro da faixa de 50-69. Embora o candidato tenha habilidades transferíveis para a vaga, a experiência específica no domínio de sistemas financeiros e GTM (go-to-market) ainda é insuficiente.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Gap de seniority (3-4 anos vs 8+ anos) e falta de experiência direta no domínio de sistemas financeiros e GTM.

core_requirements.evidence: ~3-4 years PM/TPM experience since Jul/2022, plus experience in construction industry prior to 2019

core_requirements.requirement: Understand distributed systems
core_requirements.evidence: Extensive experience in large, complex programs, including global program coordination, release management, and technical design

core_requirements.requirement: Understand Service Oriented Architecture (SOA)
core_requirements.evidence: Experience in large, complex programs involving distributed systems and SOA, as demonstrated in the Technical Program Manager role at Instituto Atlântico

core_requirements.requirement: Excellent analytical skills; you digest complex information, can distill it, and make recommendations and proposals
core_requirements.evidence: Strong track record in providing program management, critical thinking, and thought leadership, as evidenced across the candidate's experience

core_requirements.requirement: Very strong written and verbal communication skills, building strong relationships with stakeholders, teams, and senior leaders around the organization
core_requirements.evidence: Demonstrated ability to drive internal and external process improvements, build consensus, and communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui experiência relevante em gestão técnica de programas, com foco em melhoria de processos e liderança de equipes. No entanto, a vaga exige 7+ anos de experiência, e o candidato possui apenas ~3-4 anos na área de PM/TPM em tecnologia. Isso representa um gap de seniority que limita o score máximo a 65.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Gap de seniority - a vaga requer 7+ anos de experiência em PM/TPM, enquanto o candidato possui ~3-4 anos.
scored_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, Risk

core_requirements.requirement: 7+ years of software engineering, systems engineering and/or technical program management experience
core_requirements.evidence: ~3-4 years PM/TPM experience in technology, plus 3+ years in construction operations management

core_requirements.requirement: Excellent analytical skills; you digest complex information and make recommendations
core_requirements.evidence: Experience driving data-driven recommendations, including SQL, Python, Spark/Scala analysis for decision-making

core_requirements.requirement: You have a track record of providing program management during all phases of software development from kick-off to launch, demonstrating critical thinking, challenging the norms and thought leadership
core_requirements.evidence: Recent experience as TPM and PM leading large-scale technical programs and delivery management

core_requirements.requirement: You have very strong written and verbal communication skills, building strong relationships with stakeholders, teams and senior leaders around the organization
core_requirements.evidence: Demonstrated ability to drive alignment and communication across teams and functions, including executive-level presentations

core_requirements.requirement: You can drive internal and external process improvements across multiple teams and functions and bring a wealth of experience, opinions, proposals and best practices
core_requirements.evidence: Experience defining and iterating on program management frameworks and KPIs to drive efficiency and productivity improvements

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui cerca de 3 anos de experiência em papéis de gerenciamento de projetos e programas em tecnologia, o que está um pouco abaixo da extensa experiência solicitada pela vaga. Além disso, embora tenha experiência em gerenciamento de projetos e programas, o candidato não possui experiência específica no domínio de big data e análise, que é o foco da posição na Databricks. Portanto, a candidatura apresenta gaps tanto em relação à senioridade quanto ao domínio técnico requerido, o que justifica um score na faixa de 50-69.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Falta de experiência específica no domínio de big data e análise, bem como senioridade abaixo do nível esperado para a vaga.
scored_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager

core_requirements.evidence: Experience in managing enterprise scale projects, with global deployments ideally within the big data and analytics industry domain.

core_requirements.evidence: Extensive experience successfully managing and overseeing projects with teams of up to 5 people with contract values in excess of $0.5 million.

core_requirements.requirement: Possess sufficient technical understanding of the Databricks platform to confidently field initial customer technical questions and bridge communication with the appropriate subject matter experts
core_requirements.evidence: Individuals who possess sufficient technical understanding of the Databricks platform to confidently field initial customer technical questions and bridge communication with the appropriate subject matter experts.

eliminated_jobs.title: Country Manager
eliminated_jobs.jd_full:
Our belief:

  • At SOLPLANET, we are driven by a simple idea: solar for everybody
  • We strive to create the best possible experience for distributors, installers and end users
  • That´s why our solar inverters, energy storage systems and EV chargers are easy-to-install, reliable and user friendly

Who We Are:

  • Private equity-backed AISWEI is a leading provider of renewable energy solutions – providing the world with solar inverters, batteries, EV chargers, heat pumps, and energy management solutions
  • AISWEI has more than 15 years of expertise in R&D and manufacturing, with a strong technology heritage from both Germany and China
  • With 32 GW of annual production volumes (2024), AISWEI is one of the largest manufacturers of solar string inverters world-wide
  • AISWEI is operating under its own brand in China and its SOLPLANET brand internationally, and is trusted by leading global brands as an ODM service provider
  • Our team passionately believe that that we are all fellow citizens of one planet, and we are truly honored about deploying our solutions to local societies worldwide – every day

How you´ll help us:

As a Country Manager, you will

  • Set sales targets and KPI ́s and develop sales strategies for the markets in your region
    of responsibility
  • Ensure revenue generation in accordance with agreed KPI ́s in your region of
    responsibility
  • Define strategies, goals and implementation plans
  • Build and maintain relationships with customers
  • Be open to regular regional and international travel
  • Conduct regular meeting and sales reviews with customers
  • Together with local technical teams, Initiate and conduct, regular product training
    and provide product updates
  • Support the entire end-to-end customer relationship process
  • Drive the end to end sales process from lead generation to acquisition
  • Provide product & market related information to internal teams to assist in product
    development activities
  • Develop and support marketing activities in close collaboration with local market
    teams
  • Provide support on accounts receivable activities, order processing and other related
    activities

Requirements

Your background and skills:

  • Bachelor or above technical degrees, preferably in electrical engineering, renewable energy, photovoltaic engineering, or similar disciplines.
  • Native in local language and business fluetn in English.
  • In-depth knowledge of the technical requirements for PV, energy storage systems, EV chargers in the distribution and/or utility scale segments, including product specifications, grid code requirements, competitive landscape, tender requirements etc.
  • Ability to work independently and focused in a dynamic, fast-paced environment
  • Prior work experience in a PV related industry is will be an advantage

Your attributes:

  • In-depth knowledge in PV, energy storage systems, EV chargers in the distribution
    and/or utility scale segments, including product specifications, grid code
    requirements, competitive landscape, tender requirements etc.
  • Proven track record in b2b sales
  • Strong analytical skills to identify new opportunities and customers
  • Strong relationship building skills to establish and maintain trust with customers
  • Ability to close deals effectively and efficiently
  • Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written
  • Fluent in Local language and business fluent in English.
  • Prior work experience in a PV related industry is not a necessity but will be an
    advantage
  • C&lenergy storage and utility product sales experience is a Plus

Benefits

What we offer:

  • Giving you the unique opportunity to be part of a spirited and diverse team of passionate experts that work together within an exceptionally open-minded environment
  • Assisting you in to develop, personally and professionally, to grow internally within an international environment which leverages your abilities, skills and expertise
  • Providing you the unique opportunity to be part of an ambitious, energetic and rapidly growing Solplanet team with flat hierarchies, fast decision making and strong opportunities to successfully cultivate your long-term path within the renewable energy industry

By submitting your application, you declare your agreement to saving your application data at Aiswei B.V, and that such data may be used for internal purposes in the context of the upcoming application process. If there is no employment, the data will be deleted after six months. The application data are treated confidentially in accordance with the provisions of the Federal Data Protection Act and are not passed on to third parties. You can revoke your consent at any time, either by email or in writing by mail.
